title: El Dorado
author: Emmuska Orczy
description: Discusses the actions that anti governmental "patriots" have taken in America. Who they are, what they believe (conspiracy theories, patriot enemies, divine mandate), operations they have carried out, and histories of their leaders. Includes a list of more than 800 patriot organizations and paramilitary training sites and groups which are active in every state, including 441 unauthorized militia groups. Profiles the most notorious leaders in history. Examines OK City Bombing, Amtrak passenger tr...
